title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 -  24 -  2017: Google Earthing Region 14 in Rome

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on Christmas Eve 2017 from Boulder, describing his ongoing Google Earth project recreating ancient Rome in 3D. He is working on Region 14, the western side of the Tiber river, building houses and shrines, and discusses project progress, workflow challenges, and plans to finish before making YouTube videos about it. He briefly mentions listening to YouTube while working and plans to see Star Wars later that day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to finish as fast as possible to make YouTube videos and may skip apartments to keep momentum
thinks the Rome project videos could make him money
excited to see it, going soon

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, V-Log.
It's December 24th.
Oh, it's Christmas Eve.
At 1.40 p.m. on Sunday.
I didn't get to sleep last night.
I've just been working.
So let me see what I've been up to.
I'm doing Trans-Tiberium.
That was Google Earthing Rome Region 5.
And I think I finished Region 5, finally.
I had so many snafus because one time I miscounted,
But the other time I didn't notice that all of the baths,
And there were like 75 of them, were unclicked.
So when I was building houses, I built over 100 houses on top of them.
So I had to delete them and then rebuild and then recount.
But yeah, I got through that.
So now I'm doing Region 14, Trans-Tiberium.
The Heart of Rome on the right side of the river,
Western side of the river.
There are 150 houses, 4,500 or something apartments,
180 shrines.
So I'm building the shrines right now and the houses.
And yeah, I'm getting a little bit better, you know,
As regions go on.
With the houses, I'm building in doors now.
So, and different kinds of houses, different sizes of houses.
And so yeah, this is going to go by a lot faster.
I might move on to the next region though,
Before I finish this one,
With all of the apartments because there's so many of them.
I think there's like 52,500 total.
So yeah, maybe I'll just do the other buildings first
Throughout the whole city.
And then come back and do those apartments later.
Maybe I'll, yeah.
I was going to say, maybe do the apartments on the bike,
But no.
I want to get this done really quick,
As fast as I can.
Because then I can do, you know, YouTube videos of it.
But, you know, also because I might be sooner,
I might actually be able to finish this,
You know, sooner than I may realize.
Because I already traced the Severin math stuff.
All I have to do is three-dimensionalize it
And color it and stuff,
Which doesn't take me any time
Compared to what I was doing, so.
And then, you know, of course,
Making the movies might take a while,
But that'll be fun.
And that'll be a whole new thing.
And I can make money with that.
It might be when I'll try to get on Patreon.
But I wanted to clean up my website a little bit.
But anyway, yeah, it's fun.
So, um, I haven't been listening to, like,
Audiobooks recently, just to YouTube.
Um, and it's nothing, just sitting here.
You know?
So anyways, I think I'm going to take a nap.
We're going to go see Star Wars, like, really soon.
Like, in less than an hour, it starts.
So, I'm going to lie down.
Okay.
Later.
Later.
Later.
